title: After the Kikuka Sho: What's the Right Way?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Mejiro McQueeeeen! She has conquered the
Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone! Thank you for supporting
me and the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will walk proud as the Mejiro family's stayer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now... I can finally... move on to where I... where I
was meant... to go next...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Oh, I'm terribly sorry... I can't believe myself... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goal for this year was to win this race. Thank
you for your support, everyone! Now, and in the
future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears of joy run down her face. In the race of the
three Mejiros, Mejiro McQueen has taken first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Did... did McQueen actually just cry in front of everyone? ...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, Ryan? McQueen's kinda, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She's got, like, a different vibe than usual, right?
She had me shook since before the race even
started.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, she's pretty intense today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I gave 110% today too, but she was on a whole
'nother level.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah...
Hey, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Do you think that's the right way?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean happily shouldering the weight of the
Mejiro name and running for victory. I think
maybe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's what a Mejiro is supposed to do.
Like, actually run races for real.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I ran as hard as I could, of course, but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Did I really wanna win so bad that I would've
cried if I didn't? I wonder...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I realized something after running in
the Kikuka Sho today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I really am built a little different than the other
Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like... I feel like I don't have the same passion for
racing. Or the same strength to dream big.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ryan ran all of the Classic Triple Crown races with
a sense of duty to win every single one of them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And McQueen's attitude toward the race today
was really amazing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then there's me. All I was thinking about was
having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me if I was taking the race as seriously
as them, well... I can't really say I was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I like running, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I don't know where exactly I should be running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aaanyway, that just popped into my head! It's not
like I'm seriously worried about where I belong or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's enough of that! Oh, right, you gonna eat
that spicy pudding in the fridge? I've gotten
kinda addicted to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer changes the subject and heads for
the refrigerator. It seems she hasn't decided how
she feels yet.
